## Summary

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Defensive feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Refactor

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] This change is defensive and authorized-use only.
- [ ] This change does not add exploitation, credential collection, stealth, persistence, evasion, unauthorized scanning, or destructive behavior.
- [ ] Tests were added or updated where needed.
- [ ] Documentation was updated where needed.
- [ ] No secrets, local-only paths, or private data are included.
